chapter_context.summary: Hezekiah organizes priestly courses; the people bring abundant tithes; Hezekiah works whole-heartedly, prospering in all deeds.

outline.text: The Assembly Destroys Idols in Judah and Ephraim
outline.explanation: This section focuses on The Assembly Destroys Idols in Judah and Ephraim (31:1), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Hezekiah Reorganizes Priestly Courses; People Bring Abundant Tithes
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Hezekiah Reorganizes Priestly Courses; People Bring Abundant Tithes (31:2-10), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.
This section focuses on Storehouses Prepared; Hezekiah's Wholehearted Service (31:11-21), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

key_themes.title: The Temple Centered Kingdom
key_themes.description: The presence of God's glory in the Temple is the absolute center of national blessing and life.

key_themes.title: Immediate Retribution and Reform
key_themes.description: Good kings who seek the LORD experience immediate victory and peace, while unfaithfulness leads to immediate warning and exile.

devotional.question: How do the events of Chapter 31 prompt you to humble yourself, seek God's face, and turn away from compromise?
What practical reforms can you make in your daily walk to ensure your heart is dedicated to God?

cultural_historical.title: The Levitical Worship System
cultural_historical.text: Unlike the Book of Kings, Chronicles highlights the roles of singers, Levites, and liturgical musicians in the temple's daily administration.
